insight_source_id.title: Source ID
insight_source_id.description: Stable identifier for this Bitbucket Cloud instance (e.g., 'bitbucket-acme-prod').

bitbucket_username.title: Username / Email
bitbucket_username.description: Bitbucket username or email address. Required for personal API tokens. Optional for workspace access tokens (defaults to x-token-auth).

bitbucket_token.title: API Token
bitbucket_token.description: Bitbucket Cloud API token (personal or workspace access token). For personal tokens, also provide your username/email.

bitbucket_workspaces.title: Workspaces
bitbucket_workspaces.description: List of Bitbucket workspace slugs to collect.

bitbucket_start_date.title: Start Date
bitbucket_start_date.description: Start date for initial collection (YYYY-MM-DD). Commits and PRs before this date are skipped on the first run.
